name: oeri
description: Control every lock-in. Keep the power! The Good Choice for Development Application based on React, components server, hooks, and more functions.

name: xuxi
description: A very useful function to build style configuration, API Response Combination, Complex API Serialization or other properties dynamically by simplifying flexible management based on runtime conditions.

name: postcss-composer
description: A PostCSS plugin that provides composable utilities for styling components with custom themes, responsive units, and safe mixin-based variants — Made for scalable UI design.

name: coloride
description: A hex generator utility to facilitate efficient determination of theme colors in development.

name: cache-cleaner
description: Clean up cache files, trash, and build artifacts from application development using VS Code, Bun, Yarn, npm, etc.

name: Next.js-Localization
description: Changing displayed content based on the user’s preferred locale, or localization, is not something specific to Next.js. The patterns described below would work the same with any web application.
